mysql: image: 'mysql:8.4' ports: - '${FORWARD_DB_PORT:-3306}:3306' environment: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: '${DB_PASSWORD}' MYSQL_ROOT_HOST: "%" MYSQL_DATABASE: '${DB_DATABASE}' MYSQL_USER: '${DB_USERNAME}' MYSQL_PASSWORD: '${DB_PASSWORD}' MYSQL_ALLOW_EMPTY_PASSWORD: 1 MYSQL_EXTRA_OPTIONS: '${MYSQL_EXTRA_OPTIONS:-}' volumes: - 'sail-mysql:/var/lib/mysql' - './vendor/laravel/sail/database/mysql/create-testing-database.sh:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/10-create-testing-database.sh' networks: - sail healthcheck: test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-p${DB_PASSWORD}"] retries: 3 timeout: 5s
